title: Felipe José Miguel Garcia
text:
Research Interests

Environmental Economics: Deforestation dynamics, land use, and sustainability policies.
Public Policy Evaluation: Impact of government spending on regional development.
Data Science in Economics: Applied econometrics and causal inference.
